testimonials.text: Dr. Chen's acupuncture treatments transformed my chronic back pain where conventional medicine had failed. Her gentle approach and deep understanding of meridian therapy brought me relief I hadn't felt in years. I'm truly grateful for her healing touch.

The custom herbal formulas Dr. Chen prescribed have completely changed my digestive health. She took time to understand my constitution and created a treatment plan that addressed the root of my issues, not just the symptoms.

Pacific Meridian Care's cupping therapy sessions have been incredible for my athletic recovery. Dr. Chen's expertise in Traditional Chinese Medicine has helped me maintain peak performance while staying injury-free. Highly recommend!

Dr. Chen's Tuina massage technique is unlike anything I've experienced. Her knowledge of energy meridians and pressure points provided deep relief from my chronic shoulder tension. The healing continues long after each session.

After struggling with chronic pain for months, Dr. Chen's comprehensive TCM approach has given me my life back. Her pain management expertise and compassionate care have been truly life-changing. I feel balanced and energized again.
